feed.title: openbankruptcyproject.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Open Bankruptcy Project -- Empirical Research & Free Tools for Bankruptcy Court Transparency
entry.summary: Open Bankruptcy Project -- free tools, data, and research making the bankruptcy system more transparent and accessible. A 501(c)(3) nonprofit initiative.

entry.title: 11 U.S.C. Section 707 -- Dismissal of Chapter 7 Case
entry.summary: Learn about 11 u.s.c. section 707 -- dismissal of chapter 7 case in our free 2026 guide. Clear explanations, real data, and practical steps.

entry.title: 11 U.S.C. Section 707(b) -- Means Test and Abuse
entry.summary: Detailed guide to Section 707(b) means test abuse in Chapter 7 bankruptcy. Presumption of abuse, rebuttal, totality of circumstances, and how courts.

entry.title: BAPCPA at Twenty: What 4.9 Million Cases Reveal About the ABI Commission's Unfinished Business - Open Bankruptcy Project -- Openbk Project
entry.summary: Learn about bapcpa at twenty: what 4.9 million cases reveal about the abi commission's unfinished business - open bankruptcy project explained | free.
